references.title: Li6PS5X (X=Cl, Br, I): synthesis, crystal structure, ionic conductivity
references.key_content: First synthesis of argyrodite Li6PS5X. F-43m space group. 4a/4c site S/halogen disorder. Li-X bond lengths.

references.title: Influence of lattice polarizability on the ionic conductivity in the lithium superionic argyrodites
references.key_content: S/Cl site disorder vs ionic conductivity. Li migration pathways depend on halogen site preference. Bond length analysis.

references.title: Boosting solid-state diffusivity and conductivity in lithium superionic argyrodites by halide substitution
references.key_content: Li(6-x)PS(5-x)Cl(1+x) halogen-rich compositions. Vacancy introduction -> conductivity enhancement. Li5.4PS4.4Cl1.6 studied.

references.title: Elastic properties of alkali superionic conductor electrolytes from first principles calculations
references.key_content: Li6PS5Cl DFT SQS elastic: C11=39.9, C12=23.1, C44=7.8, E=22.1 GPa. 23 SE compositions compared.

references.title: Systematic structure sampling for Li+ distribution optimization in LPSCl
references.key_content: Li+ distribution (24g vs 48h) causes E variation 10-30 GPa. Li ordering directly affects local bonding -> shear/compressibility.

references.title: Finite elastic strain of cubic crystals
references.key_content: Original Birch-Murnaghan EOS derivation from Eulerian finite strain theory.

references.title: EOS: equations of state
references.key_content: BM EOS derivation tutorial. Eulerian vs Lagrangian scheme, 2nd-4th order comparison.

references.title: Atoms in Molecules: A Quantum Theory
references.key_content: Bader charge analysis theory. Electron density gradient defines atomic boundaries.

references.title: A fast and robust algorithm for Bader decomposition of charge density
references.key_content: Efficient Bader analysis implementation for VASP/QE charge densities.

references.title: Revised effective ionic radii
references.key_content: Standard ionic radii data. Cl-(1.81A), Br-(1.96A), S2-(1.84A).

references.title: Short-range order analysis of Li distribution in LPSCl
references.key_content: AIMD Li short-range order in LPSCl. Non-uniform Li distribution around S/Cl. Temperature homogenizes. Vacancy deepens inhomogeneity.

references.title: Quantum-mechanical exploration of LPSCl polymorphs
references.key_content: Pseudo-cubic vs monoclinic LPSCl. Monoclinic more rigid (higher B0). QHA B(T) calculation. Structure difference -> elastic variation.

references.title: LPSCl DFT elastic and mechanical strength
references.key_content: LPSCl DFT elastic: E=22.1 GPa (DFT-D3). Stress-strain curve for strength/ductility evaluation.

references.title: Mechanical properties of sulfide SE particles
references.key_content: Nanoindentation on SE particles. Single particle vs pellet mechanical property difference.

references.title: Microstructure effects on argyrodite mechanical properties
references.key_content: Grain boundary effects on argyrodite mechanics. Microstructure dominates polycrystal behavior.

references.title: Electronic structure and electrochemical stability of argyrodites
references.key_content: Band gap vs electrochemical stability window. SEI formation relationship.

references.title: Electrochemical stability window of Li solid electrolytes from DFT
references.key_content: Band gap vs decomposition voltage relationship for solid electrolytes.

references.title: Li10GeP2S12 electronic structure and phase stability
references.key_content: LGPS PDOS analysis separating ionic and electronic conduction.
